title: Innovation and R&D Working Group in Midwifery
content:
Innovation and R&D Working Group in Midwifery

Research Focus

It is a group that will carry out studies for the purpose of obtaining patent and utility model intellectual industrial rights by projecting new products in the field of midwifery in the light of technology and science. The main purpose of the group is to ensure that the ideas of midwives are realized. The midwifery profession is a profession group that is very open to innovation in its own essence. With this group, support will be provided for the development of the existing potential, the realization of the products and finally their commercialization. In this regard, innovative thinking skills will be supported by organizing trainings within the group and product development studies are planned.
